name: Full Recovery
text: Placeholder injury entry. Record the serious injury result here, then check the referenced rulebook table for the exact campaign effect.

name: Dead
text: Placeholder injury entry. A dead fighter should be removed from active campaign play when after-battle updates are applied.

name: Miss Next Game
text: Placeholder injury entry. Mark the fighter as unavailable for the next battle, then check the rulebook table for the exact result wording.

name: Captured
text: Placeholder injury entry. Record capture details and resolve ransom, rescue or campaign consequences with the rulebook and your campaign group.

name: Hidden
text: Temporary battle status used by Play Mode. This marker is table state only and is cleared when battle state is reset.

name: Knocked Down
text: Temporary battle status used by Play Mode. Rule text not available yet. Add this rule to the rules data file.

name: Stunned
text: Temporary battle status used by Play Mode. Rule text not available yet. Add this rule to the rules data file.

name: Out of Action
text: Temporary battle status used by Play Mode. Fighters marked Out of Action are automatically copied into the After Battle serious injury step.

name: Advances
text: The app detects advance thresholds crossed by comparing pre-battle XP with final XP after the battle. It queues one advance slot for each threshold and leaves the result for manual entry.
